title: Nagaland University Junior Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Nagaland University (NU) Junior Project Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Nagaland University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NU Junior Project Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Ed./MA in Education or any related discipline with minimum 55% marks for General and 50% for SC/ST/PH. Basic Knowledge of Computers, Proficiency in MS Office, Data processing, Reports preparation, etc., Good communication skills.
qualification.details: M.Ed./MA in Education or any related discipline with minimum 55% marks for General and 50% for SC/ST/PH. Basic Knowledge of Computers, Proficiency in MS Office, Data processing, Reports preparation, etc. Good communication skills.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. (Consolidated) for NET/Ph.D. Rs. 35,000/- p.m. (Consolidated) for Non-NET

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nagaland University Junior Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Project Fellow post at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Project Fellow position at Nagaland University is 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Project Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Ed. or MA in Education or a related discipline with at least 55% marks (50% for SC/ST/PH). Basic computer knowledge and good communication skills are also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Project Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Project Fellow post ranges from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month, depending on whether the candidate holds a NET/Ph.D. qualification.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Junior Project Fellow vacancy at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Project Fellow position at Nagaland University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Project Fellow position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q8. Does Nagaland University provide age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Age relaxation details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided summary. It is advisable to check the official notification for specific information.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable qualifications for the Junior Project Fellow role?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include basic knowledge of computers, proficiency in MS Office, data processing, and report preparation skills, along with good communication abilities.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct download link is provided.
